sections.name: VALIDATION, WHY NOTHING IS NOTHING
sections.content_preview:
Week 1 isn't about signals. It isn't about progress. It's about something quieter, desensitization.

sections.name: MECHANISM, WHY THE BRAIN NEEDS REPETITION, NOT RESULTS
